notes: v353 — Undo removed from the portfolio + brokerage fees checked. UNDO: removed the ↩ Undo buttons and the auto-sold banner from the portfolio, as you asked (now that v352 stops your own shares auto-selling, they're not needed). FEES: I audited the brokerage charging end to end. It is exactly what you expected — a flat fee per buy and per sell, once each, no double-charging and no percentage. A live test confirmed a $10 buy + $10 sell totals exactly $20, and that a pending order isn't charged twice (the fee is taken when the order is placed, refunded if it never fills, and NOT charged again when it fills). So the structure is $10 buy / $10 sell whenever the 'Brokerage per trade' field is set to 10. The reason a running total can look big is that 'Fees paid' adds up EVERY buy and sell the account has ever made — the 🤖 auto-pilot especially makes a lot of trades — so it reflects the number of trades, not a bloated per-trade fee. The Fees-paid card now shows your current rate inline (e.g. '($10/trade)') so it's clear at a glance. Tip: set the 💸 Brokerage per trade field (bottom of the portfolio) to 10 for $10/trade going forward; tell me if you'd like the fees-paid counter reset to zero for a clean start. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v353. ALSO RECENT — v352 — your shares only sell when you say so; trailing stop is opt-in. v351 — a stop you set overrides the rules (🔒). v350 — table redraw no longer freezes. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
